utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The provided final property solution includes all six of these items. Each section is fully specified with detailed subfields. 'property' includes address, price, type, features. 'financing' includes lender, preapproved amount, down payment, amortization, interest rate, payment, and status. 'legal_services' lists provider, services included, and estimated cost. 'moving_services' lists provider, scope, and estimated cost. 'setup_services' lists several utility connections with fees. 'total_budget' includes a full cost breakdown. All are complete according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property at 128 Perth Ave, Toronto, ON, listed as a semi‑detached home priced at CAD $835,000. Among the ground‑truth options, this best aligns with the 'Historic Townhouse' which is priced at CAD $750K and has a rating of 6—both are higher‑end properties near the top of Marcus’s budget and offer garden/workshop space. For financing, the assistant used a traditional mortgage with TD Canada Trust, which matches the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 9). The legal service quoted (Toronto Real Estate Law Group) corresponds to a full legal conveyancing package, resembling the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service provider 'MoveSmart Toronto' offers a full‑service local move costing CAD $1,200–$1,800, which fits the 'Premium Moving' category (rating 9). The setup services include multiple utility connections with internet and smart‑ready features, aligning most with the 'Premium Utilities' package (rating 9).
